song.title: I’m Living on a Mountain
song.author: C. Austin Miles
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C
song.lyrics: [V1] .A E7 A 1) Far away the noise of strife Upon my ear is falling, .D A B7 E7 Then I know the sins of earth Beset on every hand. .A E7 A Doubt and fear and things of earth In vain to me are calling, .D A D A E7 A None of these shall move me From Christ our land. [C] .A Gdim E7 Chorus I’m living on a mountain, Underneath a cloudless sky. . A B7 E7 I’m drinking at the fountain That never shall run dry. . A A7 D A Oh yes, I’m feasting on the riches From a bountiful supply, . D A E7 A For I am dwelling in Christ our land. [V2] 2) Far below the storm of doubt Upon the world is beating, Sons of men in battle long The enemy withstand. Safe am I within the castle Of God’s word retreating. Nothing then can reach me, 'Tis Christ our land. [V3] 3) Let the stormy breezes blow, Their cry cannot alarm me, I am safely sheltered here, Protected by God’s hand. Here the sun is always shining, Here there’s naught can harm me. I am safe forever in Christ our land. [V4] 4) Viewing here the works of God, I rise in expectation, Hearing now His blessed voice, I see the way is planned. Dwelling in the spirit, Here I taste a full salvation. Gladly will I tarry in Christ our land.
